identity.description: An intelligent AI agent that automatically parses, denoises, and estimates redshift for astronomical spectra.

inputs.description: The raw astronomical FITS spectrum file to process.
Configuration parameters for continuum fitting and noise reduction.

polynomial_order.title: Polynomial Order
polynomial_order.description: Degree of the polynomial to use for fitting the baseline.

mask_regions.title: Manual Mask Regions
mask_regions.description: Comma-separated wavelength ranges to manually mask out (e.g., '6500-6600,4800-4900').

outputs.description: The parsed spectral arrays, fitted continuum, and matched spectral lines.

tags.name: Spectral Analysis
tags.description: Handles automated FITS loading and continuum normalization.
examples: Automatically fit the continuum and identify line doublets from this MAST FITS file.
